name: HSBC Travel One Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹4,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 8X Reward Points on all international transactions
4X Reward Points on domestic travel bookings
2 Reward Points per ₹100 on all other purchases

additionalBenefits: 8X rewards on international spends - among the best
HSBC's global banking network and support
pros: HSBC's strong global presence and customer service
cons: HSBC has limited branch network in India
Annual fee of ₹2,000 requires decent spend
Travel-focused card offers less value for non-travellers
idealFor: Frequent international travellers who want strong rewards on foreign spend
HSBC banking customers looking for a travel-focused credit card

faqs.question: How do Travel Reward Points work?
faqs.answer: You earn TRPs on every spend, with accelerated earning on international and travel spends. Points can be redeemed for travel bookings, airmiles, vouchers, or statement credits.

faqs.question: Is HSBC widely available in India?
faqs.answer: HSBC has a presence in major Indian cities but has a limited branch network compared to domestic banks. Most services are available online and through the HSBC app.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹2,000 annual fee is waived on spending ₹4,00,000 or more in the previous year.
